ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client for the project */,
  "client_contact" TEXT /* Contact person for the client */,
  "client_email" TEXT /* Email address of the client contact */,
  "client_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client contact */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of project (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Company name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the supplier is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the supplier is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the supplier is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the supplier */,
  "supplier_type" TEXT /* Type of supplier (e.g., material, service) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the supplier based on performance */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed with the supplier */,
  "invoice_email" TEXT /* Email address for receiving invoices */,
  "bank_name" TEXT /* Name of the bank for payment */,
  "bank_account" TEXT /* Bank account number for payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the material (e.g., ft, mtr, unit, piece) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "gst_rate" REAL /* GST rate applicable to the material */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., metal, electrical) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred supplier for the material */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for delivery of the material */,
  "min_order_quantity" REAL /* Minimum order quantity for the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the service (e.g., unit, piece, hour) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "gst_rate" REAL /* GST rate applicable to the service */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., installation, cutting) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred supplier for the service */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for delivery of the service */,
  "min_order_quantity" REAL /* Minimum order quantity for the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_orders" (
  "po_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase order */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the purchase order is associated with */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier the purchase order is placed with */,
  "po_date" TEXT /* Date the purchase order was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the purchase order (e.g., pending, approved, completed) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the purchase order before GST */,
  "gst_amount" REAL /* Total GST amount for the purchase order */,
  "grand_total" REAL /* Grand total amount of the purchase order */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the purchase order */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the purchase order */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the purchase order was approved */,
  "delivery_address" TEXT /* Address where the delivery should be made */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of payment (e.g., pending, paid) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("po_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "po_materials" (
  "po_material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material in a purchase order */,
  "po_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purchase order */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the material ordered */,
  "rate" REAL /* Rate per unit of the material */,
  "sub_total" REAL /* Sub total amount for the material */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the material in the purchase order */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery for the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("po_material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "po_services" (
  "po_service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service in a purchase order */,
  "po_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purchase order */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the service ordered */,
  "rate" REAL /* Rate per unit of the service */,
  "sub_total" REAL /* Sub total amount for the service */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the service in the purchase order */,
  "expected_completion_date" TEXT /* Expected date of completion for the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("po_service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deliveries" (
  "delivery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery */,
  "po_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purchase order the delivery is associated with */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date the delivery was received */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the delivery (e.g., received, pending, rejected) */,
  "delivery_reference" TEXT /* Reference number or code for the delivery */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the delivery record */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the delivery */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the delivery was approved */,
  "inspection_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who inspected the delivery */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date the delivery was inspected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliveries_po_id FOREIGN KEY ("po_id") REFERENCES purchase_orders ("po_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliveries_inspection_by FOREIGN KEY ("inspection_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliveries_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliveries_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_materials" (
  "delivery_material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material in a delivery */,
  "delivery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the delivery */,
  "po_material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material in the purchase order */,
  "quantity_received" REAL /* Quantity of the material received */,
  "inspection_status" TEXT /* Inspection status of the material (e.g., inspected, pending, rejected) */,
  "inspection_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who inspected the material */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date the material was inspected */,
  "inspection_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the inspection process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_materials_inspection_by FOREIGN KEY ("inspection_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_materials_po_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("po_material_id") REFERENCES po_materials ("po_material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_materials_delivery_id FOREIGN KEY ("delivery_id") REFERENCES deliveries ("delivery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_services" (
  "delivery_service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service in a delivery */,
  "delivery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the delivery */,
  "po_service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service in the purchase order */,
  "quantity_received" REAL /* Quantity of the service received */,
  "inspection_status" TEXT /* Inspection status of the service (e.g., inspected, pending, rejected) */,
  "inspection_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who inspected the service */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date the service was inspected */,
  "inspection_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the inspection process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_services_po_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("po_service_id") REFERENCES po_services ("po_service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_services_delivery_id FOREIGN KEY ("delivery_id") REFERENCES deliveries ("delivery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_services_inspection_by FOREIGN KEY ("inspection_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., project manager, procurement officer, financial analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
